title: PatternVariant
description: Schema for PatternVariant entities representing concrete implementation variations of a construction pattern, including specific methods, materials, and dimensional constraints.

id.description: Unique identifier for the pattern variant, following the CHEM-CONSTR-VAR naming convention.

name.description: Human-readable name of the pattern variant.

description.description: Detailed description of this variant, explaining how it differs from other variants of the same pattern and when it should be applied.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON schema definition used to validate the entity.

pattern_language_version.description: Version of the Construction Pattern Language specification this entity conforms to.

entity_revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number for this entity, incremented on each update.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was originally created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was last modified.

pattern_id.description: Reference to the parent Pattern entity that this variant implements.

method.description: The construction method or technique used by this variant (e.g., cast-in-place, prefabricated, hand-laid).

materials.description: List of materials required for this variant, each described as a structured object.

items.description: A material entry specifying the material name and its role or specification.

name.description: Name of the material (e.g., Portland cement, rebar, plywood).

specification.description: Material specification or standard reference (e.g., ASTM C150 Type I).

role.description: The functional role this material plays in the variant (e.g., binder, reinforcement, formwork).

dimensional_constraints.description: Optional dimensional limits and tolerances applicable to this variant.

min_thickness.description: Minimum allowable thickness with unit (e.g., '4 in', '100 mm').

tolerance.description: Allowable tolerance for dimensional measurements (e.g., '+/- 1/8 in').

manufacturer_refs.description: Optional list of manufacturer names or identifiers that supply materials or systems for this variant.

notes.description: Free-form notes, field observations, or additional context about this pattern variant.
